text: High-quality training data ensures that generative AI models learn accurately and generalize well, leading to more reliable outputs.. In this webinar, we’ll explore how NVIDIA NeMo™ Curator enables developers to easily build scalable data processing pipelines to create high-quality datasets for training and customization.

We’ll dive deep into the complex challenges of processing multimodal data and how developers can leverage NeMo Curator modules to solve these challenges.. We’ll explore various features such as deduplication, classifier models, and filters.

Additionally, we’ll discuss how to create high-quality synthetic data to augment your existing datasets.. Whether you’re building a foundation model or fine-tuning an existing one, this webinar will offer you valuable insights on how to improve the quality of the training data.

In this webinar, you’ll: Learn how to build end-to-end data processing pipelines that can scaleExplore real-world examples and performance benchmarksLearn how to get started quickly and seamlesslyExperience a live Q&A with NVIDIA experts.

TECHNICAL OVERVEW. ENABLING ENTERPRISE AI WITH GPU-INTEGRATED INFRASTRUCTURE
DOWNLOAD NOW.

Integrating GPU-accelerated servers into the AI infrastructure and workflow of an organization can be complex due to specialized provisioning, management, and monitoring.. In this technical overview, we ll look at simplifying the integration of GPU-accelerated servers in the infrastructure, specifically focusing on:
Designing and provisioning, using reference architectures and automation tools.
Integrating GPU-accelerated applications into containers, Kubernetes, and server virtualization.. Efficient monitoring of GPU infrastructure for high performance and utilization.

Scaling GPU infrastructure and applications.. ENABLING ENTERPRISE AI WITH GPU-INTEGRATED INFRASTRUCTURE

Resources. For Enterprise AI Developers.
Explore, prototype, and test NVIDIA s latest accelerated AI APIs free.. Build.nvidia.com gives developers hands-on access to serverless endpoints, blueprints, and GPUs with zero setup.
Visit the API Catalog. For IT and DevOps.

See all the supported infrastructure software designed to optimize the utilization of GPUs, and integrate with industry-leading management frameworks.. Find a collection of reference architectures, deployment guides, whitepapers, and other informational resources in the NVIDIA AI Enterprise Documentation Hub.
Explore Docs. FAQs.

How can a developer get started quickly with NIM microservices?. Members of the NVIDIA Developer Program have access to self-hosting NVIDIA NIM for research, application development, and experimentation on up to 16 GPUs on any infrastructure cloud, data center, or personal workstation.
Access to NIM microservices is available throughout the duration of program membership.. For more information, see this FAQ.

What s the difference between open-source software and NVIDIA AI Enterprise?. NVIDIA AI Enterprise consists of open-source software that s curated, optimized, and supported by NVIDIA, as well as exclusive software that isn t open source, such as NVIDIA NIM, NVIDIA Base Command Manager, and NVIDIA vGPU.

It provides the benefits of transparency and top-of-tree innovation, as well as security and stability for ever-growing software dependencies.. With enterprise support that provides service-level agreements, NVIDIA AI Enterprise is an enterprise-grade, secure, and reliable platform to accelerate your AI journey.
How can I purchase NVIDIA AI Enterprise?. You can purchase NVIDIA AI Enterprise through the NVIDIA Partner Network and the cloud marketplaces of AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and Oracle Cloud.
Contact NVIDIA with your purchasing questions.. How does NVIDIA AI Enterprise deliver security and stability?.

NVIDIA AI Enterprise offers different software branches to maintain security and stability for desired software lifecycles, including:
Feature branches: Every AI and data science package is updated monthly with the latest features and security fixes.. It s meant for developers who want to deploy into production with the newest capabilities and are willing to update their applications if APIs change.
Production branches: A nine-month lifecycle with monthly security patches and API stability.. This is ideal for deploying AI in production when API stability is required.
Long-term support branches: A three-year lifecycle with quarterly security patches and API stability.. This is ideal for industries that prioritize long-term software lifetimes.

NVIDIA AI Enterprise customers also receive security advisories and exploitability information from NVIDIA, as well as software bill of materials (SBOM) for software supply chain transparency, and vulnerability remediation guidance with context.. Learn More.

What does Enterprise Support offer?. Each NVIDIA AI Enterprise license includes Business Standard Support that offers service-level agreements, live NVIDIA agent access, 24/7 case filing, software branches, updates and releases, knowledge base resources, and more.

Optional support upgrades, including Business Critical Support and Technical Account Manager, are available.. Learn More
What type of software is included with NVIDIA AI Enterprise?.
NVIDIA AI Enterprise includes NVIDIA NIM microservices, AI frameworks and runtimes, SDKs, libraries, infrastructure management, and more.. View the full list here.

Start Developing. Immersive Visualization and Collaboration for Enterprises.

Extended reality (XR) and spatial computing are revolutionizing professional workflows with technology that makes it possible to work at scale.. Whether holding virtual models in your hands, walking through entire virtual buildings, or rehearsing complex surgical procedures in virtual environments, these technologies are completely changing the ways to interact with immersive data.
Explore Our Extended Reality Technologies. NVIDIA's XR technologies include NVIDIA RTX GPUs, groundbreaking XR tools, and development software driving the world's greatest immersive experiences.

NVIDIA CloudXR For Groundbreaking innovation
NVIDIA CloudXR. NVIDIA CloudXR, a groundbreaking innovation built on NVIDIA RTX technology, delivers virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) across 5G and Wi-Fi networks.

VRWorks is a comprehensive suite of APIs NVIDIA VR Ready
NVIDIA VRWorks. NVIDIA VRWorks enables a new level of presence by bringing physically realistic visuals, sound, touch interactions, and simulated environments to virtual reality.

NVIDIA VR Ready
NVIDIA VR Ready. The NVIDIA VR Ready program ensures system components GPU, CPU, HMD, and drivers will provide the best immersive virtual reality experiences.

NVIDIA Omniverse
Katana
NVIDIA Omniverse. NVIDIA OmniverseTM allows developers to build immersive OpenUSD applications that seamlessly integrate with existing workflows and applications.

NVIDIA Virtual Reality Capture and Replay (VCR)
NVIDIA Virtual Reality Capture and Replay (VCR). NVIDIA VCR enables developers and users to accurately capture and replay VR sessions for performance testing, scene troubleshooting, and more.

The Latest XR News. Woman holding phone device surrounded by red, purple art
Good Things Come in Trees: Immersive 3D Experience Transports Audiences Into Augmented Reality Rainforest.

Factory 42 combined captivating storytelling with cutting-edge technology to elevate the AR experience and deliver high-fidelity, photorealistic virtual environments over 5G networks using NVIDIA RTX and CloudXR.. Read Blog.

Record, Edit and Rewind in Virtual Reality with NVIDIA VR Capture and Replay
Record, Edit, and Rewind in Virtual Reality With NVIDIA VR Capture and Replay. NVIDIA Virtual Reality Capture and Replay (VCR) enables developers and users to accurately capture and replay VR sessions for performance testing, scene troubleshooting, and more.
Now available for early access users.. Learn More.

A Server Platform for Deploying XR Applications in Private Networks. Streaming XR is changing the model of distributing immersive applications.
Learn how servers are built to deliver immersive workloads and take advantage of compute power to combine XR applications with AI and other computing functions.. Learn More.

FrameView App
FrameView is an application for measuring frame rates, frame times, power, and performance-per-watt on a wide range of graphics cards.. Download Now
Download Now
This application is not supported on mobile.
Close. Watch Video.

Version 1.6 Release Notes
Reliable Performance and Power Data
Detailed metrics are presented in real-time with a configurable overlay, and reported to a log file for convenient analysis, leveraging PresentMon for analytics.. Extensive App and API Compatibility
Unlike other measurement options, FrameView works with a wide range of graphics cards, all major graphics APIs, and UWP (Universal Windows Platform) apps.

Plus, it enables real-time power measurement through APIs, recording chip and board power* without the need for special physical equipment, while also capturing detailed performance information.. *Chip and board power on NVIDIA GPUs.
Chip power only on AMD GPUs.. For more details, read our article and power primer, or download the user guide.

Overview. The Ultimate Single-Slot GPU for AI, Neural Rendering, and Precision Workflows.

Experience the power of the most advanced single-slot GPU for professionals.. Powered by NVIDIA Blackwell architecture, NVIDIA RTX PRO 4000 Blackwell delivers breakthrough AI performance, neural graphics, and unmatched efficiency to unlock new experiences and accelerate demanding workflows.

Equipped with 24GB of ultra-fast memory, fifth-generation Tensor Cores, and fourth-generation RT Cores, work with large datasets, accelerate generative AI workflows, and render photorealistic scenes at blazing speeds.. NVIDIA Blackwell RTX PRO Comes to Workstations and Servers for Designers, Developers, Data Scientists and Creatives to Build and Collaborate With Agentic AI.
Groundbreaking AI and graphics performance redefine visualization, simulation and scientific computing from desktop to data center for millions of professionals worldwide.. Read Press Release.
Highlights. Industry-Leading Performance.

RT Core Performance.

122 TFLOPS1

Powered by NVIDIA Blackwell Architecture. NVIDIA Blackwell Architecture.
Fifth-Gen Tensor Cores. Max AI performance with FP4 and DLSS 4.
New Streaming Multiprocessors. Optimized for RTX Neural Shaders.
Fourth-Gen Ray Tracing Cores. Built for RTX Mega Geometry.

5th Gen Tensor Cores
5th Gen Tensor Cores. Fifth-generation Tensor Cores deliver up to 3X the performance of the previous generation and add support for FP4 precision and DLSS 4 Multi Frame Generation technology.

Accelerate local LLMs, prototype new AI models, and drive enhanced content creation and graphics.. 4th Gen RT Cores
4th Gen RT Cores.

Fourth-generation RT Cores deliver up to 2X the performance of the previous generation, accelerating rendering for M&E content creation, AECO design, and manufacturing prototyping.. Create photoreal, physically accurate scenes and immersive 3D designs with neural graphics-based technologies, such as RTX Mega Geometry, enabling up to 100X more ray-traced triangles.

CUDA Cores
CUDA Cores. NVIDIA Blackwell is the most powerful professional RTX GPU ever created with the latest SM and CUDA core technology.

The SM features increased processing throughput, and new neural shaders that integrate neural networks inside of programmable shaders to drive the next decade of AI-augmented graphics innovations.. 24 GB of GPU Memory
24GB of GPU Memory.

New and improved GDDR7 memory significantly boosts bandwidth and capacity, empowering your applications to run faster, and work with larger, more complex datasets.. With 24GB of GPU memory, tackle large 3D and AI projects, explore immersive VR environments, and drive multi-app workflows.

9th-Gen NVENC
9th-Gen NVENC. Ninth-generation NVIDIA NVENC engines significantly accelerate video encoding speed, and improve quality for professional video applications.

They add support for 4:2:2 H.264 and HEVC encoding, and improve HEVC and AV1 encoding quality.. 6th-Gen NVDEC
6th Gen NVDEC.

Sixth-generation NVIDIA NVDEC engines provide up to double H.264 decoding throughput and offer support for 4:2:2 H.264 and HEVC decode.. Professionals can benefit from high-quality video playback, accelerate video data ingestion, and use advanced AI-powered video editing features.

PCIe Gen 5
PCIe Gen 5. Support for PCI Express Gen 5 provides double the bandwidth of PCIe Gen 4, improving data-transfer speeds from CPU memory and unlocking faster performance for data-intensive tasks like AI, data science, and 3D modeling.

DisplayPort 2.1
DisplayPort 2.1. With DisplayPort 2.1, professionals can achieve unparalleled visual clarity and performance, driving high-resolution displays at up to 8K at 240Hz and 16K at 60Hz.

Increased bandwidth enables seamless multi-monitor setups, ideal for multitasking and collaboration, while HDR and higher color depth support ensures superior color accuracy for precision work, such as video editing, 3D design, and live broadcasting.. Workloads.
Multi-Workload Acceleration. Generative AI.
Create new and original content.. Unlock unprecedented creativity and productivity with generative AI.

The RTX PRO 4000 accelerates content creation, empowering you to generate stunning, high-fidelity images, videos, and 3D assets at unprecedented speeds.. Experience accelerated inference performance in generative AI applications to bring your most ambitious ideas to life in record time, changing the boundaries of entertainment, design, and innovation across industries.

Learn More About Generative AI
Unlock unprecedented creativity and productivity with generative AI
AI-Driven Rendering and Graphics. Deliver stunningly realistic designs and simulations with speed and precision.

The RTX PRO 4000 transforms creative workflows with next-gen RTX capabilities, fusing AI with cutting-edge ray tracing for neural graphics.. RTX Neural Shaders automate complex lighting and textures, while DLSS 4 enables real-time photorealistic rendering through AI-powered upscaling.

These advancements accelerate 3D modeling, animation, and virtual production across film, gaming, and architectural visualization.. Learn More About NVIDIA RTX Technology
NVIDIA RTX Technology
Digital Content Creation.
Accelerate content creation with real-time rendering and interactivity in 3D applications. Unlock your creative potential and bring your inspiring visions to life with RTX PRO 4000.

Experience accelerated performance, real-time rendering, and AI-powered tools for higher fidelity visual quality and seamless workflow efficiency.. Accelerate content creation with real-time rendering and interactivity in 3D applications
Video Content and Streaming.
Boost performance for live media and video pipelines.. The RTX PRO 4000 boosts performance for live media and video production pipelines.

With 4:2:2 support and advanced encoding/decoding engines, it ensures pristine color accuracy and accelerated processing of high-resolution content.. With improved AV1 and H.265 codec support, it s ideal for livestreaming, real-time editing, and live media workflows.

NVIDIA RTX PRO 4000 for Video Content and Streaming
Data Science. Accelerate your data pipelines.

RTX PRO 4000 gives you the performance you need to quickly transform massive datasets into insights with 24GB of ultra-fast G7 memory.. RTX PRO 4000 combined with NVIDIA AI delivers a complete AI platform from desktop workstations.

Learn More About RTX PRO AI Workstations

Shadow of the Tomb Raider Updates Adds Ray-Traced Shadows and DLSS. By Andrew Burnes on March 20, 2019.

|. Featured Stories
DLSS
GeForce RTX GPUs
NVIDIA RTX
Ray Tracing
Turing
Out now is an update for Shadow of the Tomb Raider, adding highly-detailed ray-traced shadows, and DLSS.

The addition of ray tracing enhances Shadow of the Tomb Raider s environments, improving the fidelity, detail and appearance of shadows across the entire game.. Compared to traditional shadow mapping techniques, ray-traced shadows have realistic penumbras, translucency, self-shadowing, and other benefits, creating contact-hardened, smooth shadows that would otherwise be impossible to render in real-time.

The result is five new types of ray-traced shadows:
Ray-Traced Point Light Shadows
Point Lights are used for smaller light sources, like candles and light bulbs, that illuminate their immediate surroundings.. With the power and accuracy of ray tracing, we re enabling these Point Lights to cast shadows, adding extra detail and realism to scenes.

shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-ray-traced-point-light-shadows-001-on-850px
With Ray Tracing enabled, flames splash the wall with pole shadows, which are appropriately hard due to their close proximity.. Debris is shadowed with fine detail, and long shadows crawl from Lara s feet, improving the look, feel and mood of the scene
shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-ray-traced-point-light-shadows-002-on-850px
shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-ray-traced-point-light-shadows-003-on-crop-850px
Ray-Traced Point Lights also enhance the look and feel of specific scenes, and add accurate shadows.

In the cemetary scene, point light candles illuminate the statue and cast its shadow with proper penumbra, the kneeling man s forward knee casts a shadow and the penumbra of his body s shadow blurs into the distance, and there s accurate shadowing around the statue s base
Ray-Traced Rectangular Spot Light Shadows
Whereas point lights are just single, omni-directional lights, area lights, such as the neon sign shown below, are directional spotlights emitting light across a sizeable portion of a scene.. By giving them the ray-traced treatment, the quality and accuracy of shadows are increased, most noticeably in the game s earlier city-based segments.

shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-ray-traced-rectangular-spot-light-shadows-001-on-crop-850px
Ray-Traced Rectangular Spot Light shadows naturally soften and intersect, mirroring the appearance of shadows in the real world
Ray-Traced Spot Light Shadows
Spot lights are directional lights that emit light in the shape of a cone, as seen on flashlights and street lights.. As with the other shadow types, upgrading them with ray tracing results in the addition of even more shadows with realistic penumbras, and improved detail that matches the shadow caster.

shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-ray-traced-circular-spot-light-shadows-001-on-crop-850px
Like Ray-Traced Rectangular Spot Light shadows, circular Ray-Traced Spot Light shadows mirror reality, adding a further degree of realism
Ray-Traced Sunlight Shadows
When Lara s taking a break from tomb raiding, she spends a considerable amount of time in sunny jungles and ancient cities, so we ensured that any shadow cast by sunlight was also enhanced.. shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-ray-traced-sunlight-shadows-001-on-850px
Ray-Traced Sunlight Shadows add depth to numerous scenes like this, accentuating the depth and detail of models, surfaces, and the environment in general.

In this example, Lara s shadow penumbra is harder the closer it is to her body, and softer as it spreads across the wall.. Fine brick detail is also shadowed, and the deep grout joints are darker than surface detail.

The result is a texture that pops with true depth information
shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-ray-traced-sunlight-shadows-002-on-crop-850px
Ray tracing s precision enables the rendering of exquisitely-detailed shadows on even the smallest and most-detailed of objects and surfaces, as exemplified by this comparison
Translucent Ray-Traced Shadows
Bright light can permeate across and travel through sufficiently translucent objects, whether those be glass windows, a hand or ear, or in the case of Shadow of the Tomb Raider, the environment s foliage.. By utilizing ray tracing, we can account for this, and accordingly brighten and darken shadows through up to three layers of foliage, further improving detail, fidelity, and realism.

If a ray goes through only one layer of foliage, the shadow is lighter than if it goes through two layers.. And if it goes through three layers, the shadow is rendered with the highest level of darkness.

Check out the example below to see how it works.. Shadow of the Tomb Raider Updates Adds Ray-Traced Shadows and DLSS
Translucent Ray-Traced shadows are a subtle-but-important step towards achieving photorealistic rendering in games.

In this image, note the overlapping shadows on the ground on the left of the image, and the varying darkness of shadows on the plant in the middle
To switch-on ray tracing, select Ray Traced Shadow Quality on the Video > Graphics options screen.. In the menu, you ll find three detail levels available to choose from --Medium, High, and Ultra-- with each successive option enabling more of the game-enhancing tech detailed above.

The Ultra setting is intended for enthusiasts who wish to push systems beyond the capabilities of today s hardware, so we therefore recommend High for the best tradeoff of image quality and performance.. The medium setting enables point light shadows that are noticeable in the game s earlier city-based segments.
To see what s enabled at each detail level, check out the chart below:. Medium.
High (Recommended). Ultra.
Ray Tracing Quality. 1 ray per pixel per light source.
1 ray per pixel per light source. Extra rays cast adaptively where a ray detects silhouettes.
Point Light Shadows. Rectangular Spot Light Shadows.
Circular Spot Light Shadows. Sunlight Shadows.
Translucent Shadows. Shadow of the Tomb Raider also adds support for NVIDIA DLSS.

As with the other DLSS-enabled games, Shadow of the Tomb Raider makes use of the Tensor Cores on GeForce RTX GPUs to accelerate performance, boosting frame rates by up to 50% at 4K, up to 20% at 2560x1440, and up to 10% at 1920x1080.. DLSS helps the most when the GPU is under maximum load and is available for the following settings:
3840x2160: Ray Tracing On or Off: All RTX GPUs
2560x1440: Ray Tracing On: All RTX GPUs
2560x1440: Ray Tracing Off: RTX 2060 and 2070
1920x1080: Ray Tracing On: RTX 2060 and 2070
Our supercomputer never sleeps, and we continue to train and improve our deep learning neural network even after a game s launch.

When we have improvements to performance or image quality ready, we provide them to you automatically via NVIDIA software updates.. To use DLSS and ray tracing in Shadow of the Tomb Raider on GeForce RTX GPUs:
Install our latest Game Ready Driver
Install Windows 10 October 2018 update (version 1809, or higher)
Head into the options, select NVIDIA RTX DLSS on the Display menu, and Ray Traced Shadow Quality on the Graphics menu
shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-nvidia-rtx-dlss-option
shadow-of-the-tomb-raider-nvidia-rtx-ray-tracing-option
In our testing, the following combination settings deliver fast, smooth Shadow of the Tomb Raider gameplay:
RTX 2060: 1920x1080, High Quality Preset with Medium Ray Tracing, DLSS On
RTX 2070: 1920x1080, Highest Quality Preset with High Ray Tracing, DLSS On
RTX 2080: 2560x1440, Highest Quality Preset with High Ray Tracing, DLSS On
RTX 2080 Ti: 3840x2160, Highest Quality Preset with High Ray Tracing, DLSS On
For more RTX announcements, check out our GDC 2019 articles, and stay tuned to GeForce.com.
If you have any comments or questions about the addition of RTX to Shadow of the Tomb Raider, please share them here or in our forums.

Troubleshooting Tips
Streaming Non Gamestream Ready Games
GameStream officially supports over 300 games, but GeForce Experience allows users to manually add and stream nearly any game.. Open GeForce Experience and navigate to the Settings > SHIELD settings.

Under the Game and Apps window, click "ADD" and browse to the location of your game's launcher.. Add Games
(Optional) If you would like to edit the display and add custom box art to your manually added game, click "EDIT.".

Here you can set the display name by selecting the icon to edit the name and box art of the applications in your list.. Once you have added applications into the list, they will appear on your SHIELD and can be launched.
Note that GameStream does not configure optimal settings for manually added games, so you may need to adjust in-game settings for the best experience.
